titleStmt.title: SII 29.73: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 73. (A.R. No. B. 517 of 1961-62.) PĒṬHŚIRŪR, CHITAPUR TALUK, GULBARGA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab in the ruined Mallikārjuna temple outside the village.

The record mentions the rule of king Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla from the capital Jayantīpura. The record is badly damaged. It states that Rebbanayya-daṇḍanāyaka of Śrīpura built the temple of Rebbēśvara and endowed lands, a flower garden, three oil mills etc., for worship, repairs, burning a perpetual lamp in the temple and for feeding students studying in the maṭha. The endowments were made over to Sadyōjāta Panditadēva, the āchārya of Nūrēśvara (temple) of Bamukūru. The endowments were made in the presence of Nāyaka Kāḷidasa, Manneya gouḍa, Ambirāyarasa • • • • • sāhaṇi, Jingaḷada-arasa, his son Permādiyarasa, other officers and samasta prajes.

It is dated Chālukya Vikrama year 41, Hēviḷambi, Vaiśākha, Amāvāsya, Sunday, Solar eclipse. It probably corresponds to 1117 A.D., May 3 [Thursday]. There was no eclipse on that day. If the cyclic year is a mistake for Vilambi then the given tithi regularly corresponds to 1118 A.D., May 22, Wednesday [not Sunday]. Solar eclipse occured on that day. Perhaps this may be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ nama śivāya . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāvara cāravē trailō
kya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka caḷukyā bha
raṇa śrī mattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivṛddhi pravardhamāna mā
caṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire jayaṁtipura (nelevīḍinoḷu) (gaḷiṁdaṁ)rā
jyaṁgeyyuttamire
samasta rājya bhāramaṁ
kāḷidāsa
ṇanā (saṁka)
sidegāśrita janakka
(vacō) praḷaya
rēdyarakṣati paṁ sa
svasti śrīmaccāḷu
kya vikrama varṣada 41 neya hēviḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada vaiśākhadamāvāsye Āditya
vāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇa (nimitta) mahādānaṁgaḷiṁ nirvvartisi
(ba) varasaṁ śrī matyūvarājaṁ
pra(dā)naṁ
nāyaka kāḷidāsa kopaṇāpuravarā
dhīśvara (tāti) maṁneya gauḍati śrī
matu (tāmaṁbirāya)rasaru kattamarasaru sāhaṇi jiṁgeḷada
Arasanuṁ Avara maga pemmāḍiyarasaruṁ Avara perggaḍe pramukha
ṇa ga(da) mūligaḷu paṁcamaṭa . samasta prajegaḷuṁ Attavare
llamirddu śrī puradārebbaṇayya daṁḍanāyaka māḍisida rebbēśvara dēvaraṁ . svasti
yama niyama svādhyāya dhyānadāraṇa maunānuṣṭhāna japasamādhiśīḷa gu
ṇa saṁpannarappa śrīmatu bamukūra nūrēśvaradācāryya sadyōjāta paṁḍitadē
vara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍidēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ pātrappāvuḷavarggakkaṁ
pākana varggakkaṁ maṭhadanōduva vidyārthi māṇigaḷāhāra dānakkaṁ caitra pavi
trakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ biṭṭa bhūmi paḍuvalu beṁḍanūrva baṭṭi baḍakalu
beṁḍanūra sīme re(bba) kaṇṭayahaḷḷa mūḍalu naṭṭa sāsana mōreyāgi
maṁneya voḷaladalu biṭṭa kōlamattaru nālvatu viṭṭa (pala)ṁkakāḷaṁ mattaru 45 matta(ṁ)
ri mūḍalu naṭṭa sāsanaṁ mēreyāgi pūdōṁṭa 1 Alliṁ baḍagalu paḷavaya ga
ḍiya matta Eraḍu dēvara puravarggakkaṁ brahmapuriya brāhmaṇarggaṁ biṭṭa kēriyo(ḷa)
dēvara naṁdā dīvigege biṭṭa gāṇaṁ mūṟu Eleyaḍake poṟagaḷa veccakkaṁ jalamaṁṭapa
rgge . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētu vasuṁdharā śaṣṭivarṣa sahasrāṇi mi(ṁ)ṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu nrupāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālani
yo bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrānu bhūyō bhūyō yācatērā
macaṁdra . bahubhirvvasudādattāṁ rājabhissagadārabhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhū
mi tasya tasya tadā phaḷa . nayadēva vāmunu(ṭṭu) rakṣisidavaṁ gāyaṁ mahāśrīṁ gā
ma kupudaṁ kāyeḷakāyva pāḍigakuṁ marpātrānva dāḷvaraṁtāgi māḷekōṭiya
(niṁkṣa)raṁ kapileya vēdāpura koḷudā(pi)ya prasūdda pujaṁ pusūṟida pudiṭṭa dā(kṣā)
raṁ dhātriyōdaḷa dūrādayarakkaṇeṇārade hārōḷāya varggaḷarkke(ṁvīra)yara
tāvaḷidadami darmamaṇa kanive tōra parkkagaḷagaḷi vindagapu śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 29.73 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
